caption: A man identified as "FRANCIS CHILAKA POLITICAL ANALYST" appears in a close-up shot, wearing a red patterned cap and a dark garment with red floral patterns. He is situated in an indoor setting against a plain, light-colored wall. Throughout the sequence, he is speaking, with his facial expressions shifting as his mouth opens and closes. The "plustv" logo is visible in the upper left corner of the video feed. A white banner across the middle contains the text "WATCH ON", "DStv CH 408", "StarTimes CH 308", "WATCH ONLINE", and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV". At the bottom of the screen, a red banner reads "PLUS POLITICS" above the bold text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a subscription bar displays "SUBSCRIBE" followed by "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA". The camera angle remains steady, focusing on the man's head and shoulders as he talks.
